pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 3.5.6 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.1.x does not fully support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21 without compatibility warnings or failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties to 21 for source and target compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without updating these properties, the project will compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if deployed on a strict Java 21 environment expecting bytecode version 65.

src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/conf.general_idea: Update LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean.setPackagesToScan to accept a varargs String instead of a String array to comply with Spring Boot 3.x / Spring Framework 6.x API changes.
src/main/java/fr/abes/baconprovider/conf.why_exists: The method setPackagesToScan(String...) no longer accepts a String[] argument in Spring Framework 6.x; passing an array causes a compilation error due to type mismatch.
